stories.title: **Headline:** Dodgers Lead MLB at 9-3 With Best Record in Baseball — No Betts, No Problem

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Dodgers are 9-3 and leading all of baseball.

Without Mookie Betts.

Ohtani: 3 HR, 7 RBI, 6 scoreless innings pitching. 5-0 on the road.

Imagine what happens when Betts comes back.

#Dodgers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Mookie Betts is "light years ahead" of his injury recovery.

Dave Roberts says it's "more moderate than significant."

The Dodgers are already 9-3 without him.

When Betts comes back, this team gets scary. #Dodgers #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Yankees 8-3 Despite A's Loss — Still on Pace for Historic Pitching Season

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Yankees pitching through 9 games:

1.16 ERA. 8 runs allowed.

That matches records from the 1940s.

Lost to the A's yesterday but this staff is still making history. Max Fried. Will Warren. All of them.

#Yankees #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
8 runs allowed in 9 games.

The last team to do that? The 1943 Cardinals.

The 2026 New York Yankees are having THAT kind of start.

Aaron Judge is also hitting. This team is different. #Yankees #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Red Sox Tie 126-Year Low — 2-8 Start is MLB's Worst Record

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Red Sox are 2-8.

That's tied for the worst nine-game start in 126 years.

A.J. Cora called it "unacceptable."

Hard to argue with that. #RedSox #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Jose Ramirez Sets Guardians Games-Played Franchise Record — Chasing 300/300 Club

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Jose Ramirez just set the all-time Guardians franchise record for games played.

He's never played for anyone else.

Now he's chasing 300 HR and 300 SB in the same career. Only 8 players have ever done it.

Jo-Ram might become the 9th. #Guardians #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Brewers-Reds NL Central Tie — Two Teams No One Predicted to Be Here

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
NL Central power rankings after two weeks:

1. Milwaukee Brewers — 8-4 (+30 run differential)
1. Cincinnati Reds — 8-4

PECOTA projected the Brewers to finish 81-81.

The Reds have a 0.82 ERA starter.

Nobody saw this coming. #Brewers #Reds #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Shohei Ohtani Two-Way Season Watch — Week 2 Stats

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Through two weeks, Shohei Ohtani is:

Batting: 3 HR, 7 RBI, .420 wOBA
Pitching: 6 IP, 0 ER, 6 K in his only start

His on-base streak is at 36+ games.

The two-way season is very much alive. #Dodgers #MLB #Ohtani

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:

Best record: Dodgers 9-3
Worst record: Red Sox 2-8
